title: Housing Adaptations for Disabled Veterans Act of 2018
fullText:
Housing Adaptations for Disabled Veterans Act of 2018 (Public Law 115-177).
An Act to specify the number of officers who may serve as Assistant Secretaries of Veterans Affairs, and for other purposes.

Amended 38 U.S.C. 3104(a)(12) to specify rules for providing home adaptation services under the Chapter 31 program, ensuring disabled veterans receive necessary home modifications to live independently.
plainEnglish: Ensures that severely disabled veterans can receive housing adaptation services under Chapter 31 to improve independence in daily living.
veteranUse: Cite this section when requesting home modifications or independent living assessments that involve adaptions to your residence.
